arts.ttl: Two transfers blocked by Andrea Berta shows type of character Arsenal are getting
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are convinced the club's new sporting director is the real deal after learning why he blocked two high-profile transfers at Atletico Madrid. Nevertheless, Arsenal co-chair Josh Kroenke praised Berta's "great track record" and insisted he'd be a "great addition" to the club.

arts.ttl: £58m Viktor Gyokeres transfer, Nico Williams move, Bukayo Saka return - Arsenal dream attack - Kieran King - football.london
arts.sum: Gyokeres has been long admired by Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta - who was appointed on Sunday - and is anticipated to figure prominently as the club look to strengthen up front. And if the Gunners can get a deal over the line for Gyokeres, they could have a 'dream' forward line for next season.

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Fulham, Andrea Berta, Bukayo Saka return and team news
arts.sum: In terms of managing his return to football, because it's been more than three months he's been missing, what sort of role do you think we could see him play tomorrow night? They have great organisation, a lot of individual quality and a very clear identity of how they play, how they want to approach the games, especially against us.

arts.ttl: Arsenal chief 'considered' for key Rangers role as Mikel Arteta tells his old team 'this guy is phenomenal'
arts.sum: Rangers are said to be interested in Jason Ayto, who has been in charge of the Gunners' scouting since 2021

arts.ttl: Inside Bukayo Saka's return to Arsenal and how Mikel Arteta used him as a secret weapon while injured
arts.sum: It took one picture of Bukayo Saka to send the Arsenal fanbase into a frenzy. It came last week, showing him smiling on the London Colney training pitches, with the caption 'Hello again'.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says Myles Lewis-Skelly has just done something quite 'unusual'
Report: Arsenal and Tottenham will now have to pay £28m to sign striker target who's a free agent this summer
arts.sum: But the transfer fee would be £0 this summer 🤯

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed double injury update as Arne Slot gears up for Arsenal challenge
arts.sum: Liverpool handed been handed a selection boost ahead of their Premier League return as they look to extend their lead over nearest challengers Arsenal. Liverpool will return to action for the first time since their sobering Carabao Cup final defeat to Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: He is the Arsenal player who Xavi described as the ‘future of English football’ but he ended up leaving the Gunners for free
arts.sum: Under Arsene Wenger’s guidance, Arsenal fans were used to watching the emergence of some of the best young players in European football. Wenger had an...

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Gunners handed major Bukayo Saka boost ahead of Fulham clash
arts.sum: Arsenal head coach Mikel Arteta reveals that Bukayo Saka is ready to play following three months on the sidelines with a hamstring injury.
